revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-030

Alternative term: (Unlighted) Beacon (G.B.) Daybeacon (U.S.A.)

An unlighted navigation mark.


Note: In the U.S.A. the word "Daymark" is also used for the daytime character of an aid to navigation.

{{IALAFooter}}
